notes: Discovered in Palisades Tahoe Netlify Vue widget JS. SnowReport includes BaseArea/MidMountainArea/SummitArea with BaseIn/BaseCm, Last24HoursIn, Last48HoursIn, Last72HoursIn, Last7DaysIn, StormTotalIn, SeasonTotalIn, BaseConditions, LastUpdate. Best direct public JSON endpoint found.
Discovered in same widget JS. Current response contained Name, LastUpdate, Forecast but no SnowReport object. Weather endpoint exists separately. May be legacy/forecast-only for Alpine.
Weather-only JSON for base/mid/summit CurrentConditions. Useful for weather snapshots but not snow base depth.
Weather-only JSON for Alpine base/mid/summit CurrentConditions. Useful for weather snapshots but not snow base depth.

Endpoint is embedded as data-endpoint on official page header weather-widget. Current response is public JSON with season, mountains, weather, forecast; in summer, weather.snow is null. Likely best official endpoint to poll in winter.

Page is Next.js App Router/RSC. Static HTML includes self.__next_f flight payload with snowConditions config and weather station metadata; rendered page/search result exposes base-depth values. Not a clean JSON API; ingestion would require RSC/HTML parsing unless a backing endpoint is discovered.

Official WordPress page renders report-list/report-item HTML with resort weather/snow rows and detail pages. No JSON endpoint found; includes external var.resortech script reference but DNS fetch failed. HTML parsing is viable.

Official PDF endpoint returns a report PDF. Search result exposes SNOW BASE labels; direct fetch returns PDF bytes. Use PDF text extraction if allowed. Official web page itself is protected/limited and did not expose clean JSON.

resort_scope: Vail / Breckenridge / Park City / many Epic resorts
notes: Static fetches are blocked or return short challenge/reservation shell pages. No public JSON endpoint found in this pass. Prefer licensed Mountain News/SnoCountry feed or official page browser/PDF extraction where available.

Official docs say API returns resort-sourced snow depths at base/mid/summit where available, recent snowfall, lifts, terrain, surface type, status. Recommended production feed if licensing is feasible.
Docs describe JSON API with resort list and getSnowReport. Requires API key; sample key limited to a few resorts. Candidate fallback/alternative to Mountain News.
